# IdeaFlow Templates

This directory contains user-downloadable templates for project planning and management.

## Available Templates

| Template                                        | Description                                     |
| ----------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| [Blueprint Template](./blueprint_template.md)   | Project blueprint and architecture template     |
| [Roadmap Template](./roadmap_template.md)       | Project roadmap and milestone planning template |
| [Tasks Template](./tasks_template.md)           | Task breakdown and management template          |
| [User Story Template](./user-story_template.md) | User story writing template                     |

## Usage

1. Click on any template above to view its contents
2. Copy the template to use in your own project
3. Customize the template to fit your needs

## Related Documentation

- [User Story Engineer Guide](../user-story-engineer.md) - Best practices for writing user stories
